session: Session 3: SAS/CAS Project Data Sphere clinical extraction (5-worker parallel)

A_ruo_contamination.name: RUO_contamination
A_ruo_contamination.detail: crispro_kb_v3 (RUO capability KB) unchanged at 1418; SAS clinical content isolated in zeta_vault. No RUO->clinical bleed.

B_evidence_tier_preservation.name: evidence_tier_preservation
B_evidence_tier_preservation.detail: All entities carry verbatim_evidence + source_receipts. Genomics tier (31 GenomicFeature / 719 Biospecimen) preserved untouched. Clinical nodes cite SAS PDS.

C_no_fabrication.name: no_fabrication
C_no_fabrication.detail: 71 inaccessible trials annotated 'no_loadable_tables' with 0 fabricated patients/AE/arms. AE singletons pooled into rollups (only 2439 tiered nodes minted). NO forced same_indication/measures_gene/targets_drug edges. Only 2 stratified_by_biomarker edges (colorectal KRAS), disease_context='colorectal', NOT merged with ovarian MSK gene nodes.

D_collection_separation.name: collection_separation
D_collection_separation.detail: zeta_vault (20211) and crispro_kb_v3 (1418) are distinct Qdrant collections. Neo4j :ZetaVault subgraph (20211) has 0 edges crossing into the 691 preserved non-Zeta crispro_kb nodes.
